message:
fix(a11y): improve reduced motion handling and add analytics

BasketSidebar improvements:
- Use `initial={false}` for reduced motion to skip entry animation
- Disable layout animations when reduced motion preferred
- Shorten exit duration (0.1s) for reduced motion users
- Add analytics tracking for basket clear action

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
